title: Field
description: Foldkit-native Base UI Field composition primitive preserving root, item, label, control, description, error, validity data, ARIA relationships, and validation data attributes with model-owned validation state.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, html factory APIs, and Schema tagged struct helpers for the Foldkit-native render helper.
Provides Effect Schema, predicate helpers, and array helpers for validation facts and attribute derivation.

development.reason: Origin React runtime is evidence only; installable source is Foldkit-native.
Origin React runtime is evidence only; installable source is Foldkit-native.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.

deviations.summary: Validation is represented by explicit Schema tagged states instead of Base UI React's internal validation hooks and Form context.
deviations.rationale: Foldkit keeps validation facts in the consuming model. Field exposes pure validity helpers and attributes so update owns validation transitions.

deviations.summary: Label, control, description, and error relationships use explicit or field-derived ids instead of React context registration.
deviations.rationale: Foldkit render helpers are stateless. Deterministic ids preserve accessible relationships without hidden mutable registration state.

deviations.summary: Parity origin fixture uses static source-derived markup for deterministic Field output.
deviations.rationale: The React origin's dynamic validation machinery is evidence for attributes and relationships; the Foldkit port intentionally keeps state outside the component.
